regions.text: Now Tom and Jane are back from school. Jane is reading a story.
Tom is writing at the table. Tom's dog is at his feet.
Mrs. Smith is reading the newspaper.
Tom and Jane are getting a good education. They get some of it at school, and they get some of it from their mother and father. Mrs. Smith is taking a look at Tom's work. It is good work.
Now Mrs. Smith is writing a letter to Mr. Smith. She sends love from Tom and Jane to their father.
She will send the letter to Mr. Smith.
She has the letter in her hand.
Now she is sending the letter.
